channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Today's Dollar to Naira Exchange Rates at Black Market and CBN
item.description: As of May 6th, 2026, the exchange rate of the US dollar to the Nigerian Naira shows some variation between the Central Bank of Nigeria (CBN) official rates and the black market (parallel market or Abo...

item.title: Court hears evidence of abuse and death of adopted baby in Blackpool
item.description: A court in Preston is hearing the trial of Jamie Varley, 37, and his partner John McGowan-Fazakerley, 32, accused of the abuse and murder of their adopted 13-month-old son, Preston Davey. According to...

item.title: Pope Leo Marks First Year with Active Global Leadership
item.description: Pope Leo XIV, the first US-born pope, celebrates his first year leading the Catholic Church on May 8, 2026, with a more prominent public profile and active schedule. Initially maintaining a low profil...

item.title: Kenya Starts Study on Aflatoxins and Climate Effects on Child Health
item.description: The Kenyan government, in partnership with KEMRI, has launched the TRACE project to study how aflatoxins affect children, particularly in relation to climate change. The initiative was rolled out in K...

item.title: Comedian Jaymoh Decin Goes Viral with William Ruto Impersonation Skit
item.description: Comedian Jaymoh Decin has once again caught the attention of Kenyans online after releasing a skit where he impersonates President William Ruto. Known for his humorous and often cheeky content, Jaymoh...

item.title: Mandela Bay Development Agency’s approach to sustainable urban regeneration
item.description: The Mandela Bay Development Agency (MBDA) plays a pivotal role in revitalising neglected areas within Nelson Mandela Bay, focusing on projects that serve both communities and businesses. Acting CEO Un...

item.title: Heavy rains increase Kenya’s hydropower generation while dams remain under control
item.description: Kenya’s electricity supply has received a strong boost following increased hydropower generation driven by ongoing heavy rains across key catchment areas. According to KenGen, the country recorded abo...

item.title: Deputy Spokesperson Confident Oyedele Will Improve 2025 Budget Implementation
item.description: The Deputy Spokesperson of Nigeria's House of Representatives, Hon Philip Agbese, don express confidence say the new Minister of Finance and Coordinating Minister of the Economy, Taiwo Oyedele, get th...

item.title: Atlas Arteria moves to divest Chicago Skyway stake amid IFM takeover attempt
item.description: Atlas Arteria has disclosed plans to sell its controlling stake in the Chicago Skyway toll road, an asset valued at roughly $3 billion, while simultaneously fending off a hostile $6.9 billion takeover...

item.title: US to Transfer Peshawar Consulate Operations to Islamabad Embassy
item.description: The United States State Department has decided to gradually close its consulate in Peshawar and move its operations to the embassy in Islamabad. According to official statements, the main reason behin...

item.title: Notable ASX Drill Results from BMC Minerals, Caspin Resources and Barton Gold
item.description: Last week, several ASX-listed mining companies reported noteworthy drill results, with BMC Minerals leading the pack. At its Kudz Ze Kayah project in Yukon, Canada, BMC Minerals hit a thick, high-grad...

item.title: Congress supports Vijay's TVK; AIADMK considers alliance in Tamil Nadu
item.description: In a significant political development in Tamil Nadu, actor-turned-politician Vijay's Tamilaga Vettri Kazhagam (TVK) is nearing majority support in the 234-member state assembly. With 108 seats, TVK i...

item.title: Rising Amapiano Star JayJayy Shares Her Journey and Debut Album ‘Detour’
item.description: At only 20 years old, Kamogelo Mokoti, popularly known as JayJayy or 'TheLoverGirl', is quickly establishing herself in the South African amapiano scene. Born and raised in Diepkloof, Soweto, she has ...

item.title: Mental health inquiry examines discharge of Valdo Calocane prior to triple murder
item.description: A public inquiry has revealed that Valdo Calocane, who later killed three people in Nottingham, was discharged from mental health services after healthcare workers were unable to locate him. Calocane,...

item.title: Vance’s 2028 presidential prospects in Iowa depend on Trump’s legacy and the economy
item.description: Vice President JD Vance made his first trip to Iowa as vice president, rallying support for Republican Congressman Zach Nunn in a competitive district while quietly testing his appeal ahead of the 202...

item.title: Passengers Isolate on Cruise Ship After Hantavirus Outbreak Off Cape Verde
item.description: Nearly 150 passengers aboard the MV Hondius cruise ship are isolating in their cabins following a hantavirus outbreak that has killed three people and left several others seriously ill. The ship, anch...

item.title: Rivers United Supporters Club Chairman Backs Team to Win League
item.description: The report focuses on the Rivers United Supporters Club chairman, who expressed strong confidence that Rivers United will win the league. The main point of the story is his optimism about the team’s f...

item.title: Indian Navy Chief Visits Myanmar to Strengthen Maritime Cooperation and Defence Ties
item.description: In a strategic move to further India's 'Act East Policy', Admiral Dinesh K Tripathi, the Chief of the Naval Staff, recently concluded an official visit to Myanmar. During his four-day tour from May 2 ...

item.title: Maskandi legend Ihhashi Elimhlophe to document his legacy after Metro FM honour
item.description: Veteran maskandi musician Ihhashi Elimhlophe, whose real name is Bheki Ngcobo, is planning to produce a documentary capturing his life and musical journey after receiving a Lifetime Achievement Award ...

item.title: Orlando Bloom attends Met Gala afterparty with model Meredith Duxbury, not ex lookalike
item.description: Orlando Bloom, aged 49, was seen entering a high-profile Met Gala afterparty in New York City alongside model and influencer Meredith Duxbury, 27. Although Duxbury bears a resemblance to Bloom's ex-pa...
